reviews.comment:
Muy mala atención, falta higiene a los baños y no tenían mercadería en el bar, lo que había era viejo estaba en mal estado.

(Translated by Google)
Very poor service, the bathrooms were unhygienic, and the bar had no merchandise; what they had was old and in bad condition.

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención, en temporada alta suele estar muy congestionada. Los precios en el YPF full me parecieron algo caros.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, but it's usually very busy during peak season. I found the prices at the YPF full service station a bit steep.

reviews.comment:
Si bien hay muchos vehículos para cargar combustible, son lentos para atender. La estación está en buenas condiciones y el servicompras muy surtido

(Translated by Google)
While there are many vehicles waiting to refuel, service is slow. The station is in good condition and the convenience store is well-stocked.
